coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide subscription plan management: create/edit plans with pricing tiers and trial periods.
task_titles: Implement subscription plan management: create/edit plans with pricing tiers and trial periods workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide payment collection via Stripe with automatic renewal and card retry logic.
The system should provide invoice generation with PDF download, VAT calculation, and email delivery.
task_titles: Implement invoice generation with PDF download, VAT calculation, and email delivery notification workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide dunning management: automated retry schedule and account suspension on failure.
task_titles: Implement dunning management: automated retry schedule and account suspension on failure workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Billing Admin — The Billing Admin should provide usage-based billing: metering API for tracking consumption and overage charges.
Actor: Billing Admin — The Billing Admin should provide customer billing portal: view invoices, update payment method, cancel subscription.
task_titles: Implement customer billing portal: view invoices, update payment method, cancel subscription

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide revenue reporting: MRR, churn rate, LTV dashboards for finance team.
task_titles: Implement revenue reporting: MRR, churn rate, LTV workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should enforce idempotent operations.
The system should keep audit logs for privileged actions.
task_titles: Enforce audit logs for privileged actions compliance requirements

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should complete within 10 seconds to avoid timeout..

risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Compliance-oriented requirements are present and should be validated early to avoid late rework.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
3 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: fintech, payments, and billing operations.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 7 functional task(s) and 3 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 7 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 10 requirements -> 10 atomic tasks across 3 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T009 -> T002 -> T003 (3 hops, ~9 story points, estimated 5 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize system performance constraints blocks 7 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 3 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. External dependencies: 1 third-party services (Stripe) should be contract-ready before Sprint 2. Effort breakdown: 286 estimated hours | FR: 178h | NFR: 108h.
